creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Ah, yes it was effectively gone, but another change had overwritten the removal from OPTIONS_DEFINE and OPTIONS_DEFAULT.  Thanks, I will fix that shortly.

As you can see from the Phabricator thread a mechanism for default flavors was suggested, but there are some issues to overcome.  See the posts between Jan 16 2018, 10:26 AM and Jan 17 2018, 7:31 AM (my timezone).
